name: First Intervention
description: Spend favor to nudge the world for the first time.

name: Ascendant
description: Rise to the fifth tier of divine standing.

name: Kingmaker
description: Cultivate a full roster of champions.

name: Maker of Legends
description: See a hero pass into legend.

name: Witness to Ages
description: Watch an age end and a new one dawn.

name: The Prophet
description: Win ten wagers at the Divine Observatory.

name: Mythwright
description: Raise a candidate tale into a living myth.

name: Open-Handed
description: Pour a thousand favor into the world.

name: The Great City
description: See a settlement swell into a metropolis.

name: Archmage
description: Guide a school of magic to fully Known mastery.

name: New Lands
description: Watch the map grow as a new region is born.
